name: Dewald Visser
role: Founder, Growth Marketer, Designer, Systems Builder
heroPosition: I connect strategy, campaigns, design, websites and practical AI adoption into systems that help brands move.
aboutHeadline: A founder-operator across brand, marketing, web systems and AI enablement, built for teams that need the thinking and the making in one place.
aboutBody: Director at clicklocal.co.za and a hands-on designer-developer across Adobe, WordPress, Shopify, front-end code and campaign systems. The work spans e-commerce pivots, booking platforms, learning content, paid campaigns and early AI-readiness programmes - comfortable owning the strategy, the system and the final pixel.
